workflows.name: 受理申请
workflows.description: 受理原始需求并写入受理台。

data.propertiesJson: {"outputPorts":"[{\"name\":\"request\",\"type\":\"object\",\"label\":\"原始需求\",\"description\":\"当前表单原始需求对象\"}]"}
{"fields":["需求编号","项目名称","介质","阀门品类","公称通径DN","压力等级PN","设计温度","连接方式"]}

{"includeSource":true,"fieldMap":{"需求编号":"=Number(record.需求编号 || 0)","受理状态":"=inputs.missingFields.length > 0 ? \"待澄清\" : \"待澄清\"","技术完整度":"=inputs.missingFields.length > 2 ? \"低\" : inputs.missingFields.length > 0 ? \"中\" : \"待评估\"","风险标签":"常规","推荐方案号":"","最终确认人":"","状态说明":"=inputs.missingFields.length > 0 ? \"已受理，等待工况澄清\" : \"已受理，进入标准化流程\""}}
{"includeSource":false,"fieldMap":{"受理状态":"$record.受理状态","状态说明":"$record.状态说明"}}
{"expression":"Number(inputs.request?.需求编号 || 0)","targetField":""}
{"tableId":"request_intake","sheetName":"需求受理台账","keyField":"需求编号","keyValueExpr":"$row.需求编号"}
{"fieldMap":{"受理状态":"$record.受理状态","状态说明":"$record.状态说明"}}
{"template":"需求 {需求编号} 已受理","messageType":"success"}

{"inputPorts":"[{\"name\":\"requestId\",\"type\":\"number\",\"label\":\"requestId\",\"description\":\"\"},{\"name\":\"statusPatch\",\"type\":\"object\",\"label\":\"statusPatch\",\"description\":\"\"},{\"name\":\"writeBack\",\"type\":\"object\",\"label\":\"writeBack\",\"description\":\"\"},{\"name\":\"message\",\"type\":\"string\",\"label\":\"message\",\"description\":\"\"},{\"name\":\"appliedFields\",\"type\":\"array\",\"label\":\"appliedFields\",\"description\":\"\"}]"}

workflows.name: 标准化工况
workflows.description: 把原始业务字段转成标准技术画像并回填风险标签。

data.propertiesJson: {"outputPorts":"[{\"name\":\"request\",\"type\":\"object\",\"label\":\"原始需求\",\"description\":\"原始需求对象\"}]"}
{"tableId":"technical_profile","sheetName":"技术画像","column":"技术画像ID","start":3001,"step":1}

{"rules":[{"target":"标准介质组","source":"$record.介质","mode":"enum","defaultValue":"通用系统","map":{"清水":"水系统","蒸汽":"蒸汽系统","油品":"油品系统","腐蚀液":"腐蚀系统","天然气":"气体系统"}},{"target":"温度分段","source":"$record.设计温度","mode":"range","defaultValue":"常温","ranges":[{"min":260,"value":"高温"},{"min":120,"max":260,"value":"中高温"},{"min":-9999,"max":120,"value":"常温"}]},{"target":"压力分段","source":"$record.压力等级PN","mode":"range","defaultValue":"常压","ranges":[{"min":40,"value":"超高压"},{"min":25,"max":40,"value":"中高压"},{"min":-9999,"max":25,"value":"常压"}]}]}

{"rules":[{"mode":"tags","tags":[{"label":"驱动方式","when":"=record[\"驱动方式\"] === \"\" || record[\"驱动方式\"] === undefined || record[\"驱动方式\"] === null"},{"label":"泄漏等级","when":"=record[\"泄漏等级\"] === \"\" || record[\"泄漏等级\"] === undefined || record[\"泄漏等级\"] === null"},{"label":"预算等级","when":"=record[\"预算等级\"] === \"\" || record[\"预算等级\"] === undefined || record[\"预算等级\"] === null"},{"label":"交期要求","when":"=record[\"交期要求\"] === \"\" || record[\"交期要求\"] === undefined || record[\"交期要求\"] === null"},{"label":"安装位号","when":"=record[\"安装位号\"] === \"\" || record[\"安装位号\"] === undefined || record[\"安装位号\"] === null"}]}]}

{"rules":[{"mode":"tags","tags":[{"label":"高温","when":"=Number(record.设计温度 || 0) >= 260"},{"label":"高压","when":"=Number(record.压力等级PN || 0) >= 25"},{"label":"腐蚀","when":"=String(record.介质 || \"\") === \"腐蚀液\""},{"label":"交付紧急","when":"=String(record.交期要求 || \"\") === \"加急\""},{"label":"严密封","when":"=String(record.泄漏等级 || \"\") === \"VI级\""}]}]}

{"includeSource":false,"fieldMap":{"技术画像ID":"$inputs.profileId","需求编号":"=Number(record.需求编号 || 0)","标准介质组":"=inputs.classifications[\"标准介质组\"]","温度分段":"=inputs.classifications[\"温度分段\"]","压力分段":"=inputs.classifications[\"压力分段\"]","技术完整度":"=inputs.missingFields.length === 0 ? \"高\" : inputs.missingFields.length <= 2 ? \"中\" : \"低\"","风险标签":"=inputs.riskFlags.length > 0 ? inputs.riskFlags.join(\"、\") : \"常规\"","缺失项":"=inputs.missingFields.join(\"、\")","受理状态":"=inputs.missingFields.length === 0 ? \"待筛选\" : \"待澄清\"","阀门品类":"$record.阀门品类","公称通径DN":"$record.公称通径DN","压力等级PN":"$record.压力等级PN","设计温度":"$record.设计温度","目标流量":"$record.目标流量","连接方式":"$record.连接方式","驱动方式":"$record.驱动方式","泄漏等级":"$record.泄漏等级","预算等级":"$record.预算等级","交期要求":"$record.交期要求","安装位号":"$record.安装位号","技术备注":"$record.技术备注"}}
{"includeSource":false,"fieldMap":{"需求编号":"$record.需求编号","受理状态":"$record.受理状态","技术完整度":"$record.技术完整度","风险标签":"$record.风险标签","状态说明":"=record.缺失项 ? \"存在待补充字段，仍需澄清\" : \"已生成技术画像，可进入候选筛选\""}}
{"tableId":"technical_profile","sheetName":"技术画像","keyField":"技术画像ID","keyValueExpr":"$row.技术画像ID"}
{"tableId":"request_intake","sheetName":"需求受理台账","keyField":"需求编号","keyValueExpr":"$row.需求编号"}
{"fieldMap":{"技术画像ID":"$record.技术画像ID","标准介质组":"$record.标准介质组","温度分段":"$record.温度分段","压力分段":"$record.压力分段","技术完整度":"$record.技术完整度","风险标签":"$record.风险标签","缺失项":"$record.缺失项","受理状态":"$record.受理状态"}}
{"template":"技术画像已生成，当前状态 {受理状态}","messageType":"success"}

{"inputPorts":"[{\"name\":\"normalizedProfile\",\"type\":\"object\",\"label\":\"normalizedProfile\",\"description\":\"\"},{\"name\":\"missingFields\",\"type\":\"array\",\"label\":\"missingFields\",\"description\":\"\"},{\"name\":\"riskFlags\",\"type\":\"array\",\"label\":\"riskFlags\",\"description\":\"\"},{\"name\":\"statusPatch\",\"type\":\"object\",\"label\":\"statusPatch\",\"description\":\"\"},{\"name\":\"profileId\",\"type\":\"number\",\"label\":\"profileId\",\"description\":\"\"},{\"name\":\"writeProfile\",\"type\":\"object\",\"label\":\"writeProfile\",\"description\":\"\"},{\"name\":\"writeRequest\",\"type\":\"object\",\"label\":\"writeRequest\",\"description\":\"\"},{\"name\":\"message\",\"type\":\"string\",\"label\":\"message\",\"description\":\"\"},{\"name\":\"appliedFields\",\"type\":\"array\",\"label\":\"appliedFields\",\"description\":\"\"}]"}

workflows.name: 补全并固化画像
workflows.description: 在技术澄清后再次固化画像状态。

data.propertiesJson: {"outputPorts":"[{\"name\":\"profile\",\"type\":\"object\",\"label\":\"技术画像\",\"description\":\"技术画像对象\"}]"}

{"rules":[{"target":"标准介质组","source":"$record.介质","mode":"enum","defaultValue":"通用系统","map":{"清水":"水系统","蒸汽":"蒸汽系统","油品":"油品系统","腐蚀液":"腐蚀系统","天然气":"气体系统"}},{"target":"温度分段","source":"$record.设计温度","mode":"range","defaultValue":"常温","ranges":[{"min":260,"value":"高温"},{"min":120,"max":260,"value":"中高温"},{"min":-9999,"max":120,"value":"常温"}]},{"target":"压力分段","source":"$record.压力等级PN","mode":"range","defaultValue":"常压","ranges":[{"min":40,"value":"超高压"},{"min":25,"max":40,"value":"中高压"},{"min":-9999,"max":25,"value":"常压"}]}]}

{"rules":[{"mode":"tags","tags":[{"label":"驱动方式","when":"=record[\"驱动方式\"] === \"\" || record[\"驱动方式\"] === undefined || record[\"驱动方式\"] === null"},{"label":"泄漏等级","when":"=record[\"泄漏等级\"] === \"\" || record[\"泄漏等级\"] === undefined || record[\"泄漏等级\"] === null"},{"label":"预算等级","when":"=record[\"预算等级\"] === \"\" || record[\"预算等级\"] === undefined || record[\"预算等级\"] === null"},{"label":"交期要求","when":"=record[\"交期要求\"] === \"\" || record[\"交期要求\"] === undefined || record[\"交期要求\"] === null"},{"label":"安装位号","when":"=record[\"安装位号\"] === \"\" || record[\"安装位号\"] === undefined || record[\"安装位号\"] === null"}]}]}

{"rules":[{"mode":"tags","tags":[{"label":"高温","when":"=Number(record.设计温度 || 0) >= 260"},{"label":"高压","when":"=Number(record.压力等级PN || 0) >= 25"},{"label":"腐蚀","when":"=String(record.介质 || \"\") === \"腐蚀液\""},{"label":"交付紧急","when":"=String(record.交期要求 || \"\") === \"加急\""},{"label":"严密封","when":"=String(record.泄漏等级 || \"\") === \"VI级\""}]}]}

{"includeSource":false,"fieldMap":{"技术画像ID":"$record.技术画像ID","需求编号":"=Number(record.需求编号 || 0)","标准介质组":"=inputs.classifications[\"标准介质组\"]","温度分段":"=inputs.classifications[\"温度分段\"]","压力分段":"=inputs.classifications[\"压力分段\"]","技术完整度":"=inputs.missingFields.length === 0 ? \"高\" : inputs.missingFields.length <= 2 ? \"中\" : \"低\"","风险标签":"=inputs.riskFlags.length > 0 ? inputs.riskFlags.join(\"、\") : \"常规\"","缺失项":"=inputs.missingFields.join(\"、\")","受理状态":"=inputs.missingFields.length === 0 ? \"待筛选\" : \"待澄清\"","阀门品类":"$record.阀门品类","公称通径DN":"$record.公称通径DN","压力等级PN":"$record.压力等级PN","设计温度":"$record.设计温度","目标流量":"$record.目标流量","连接方式":"$record.连接方式","驱动方式":"$record.驱动方式","泄漏等级":"$record.泄漏等级","预算等级":"$record.预算等级","交期要求":"$record.交期要求","安装位号":"$record.安装位号","技术备注":"$record.技术备注"}}
{"includeSource":false,"fieldMap":{"需求编号":"$record.需求编号","受理状态":"$record.受理状态","技术完整度":"$record.技术完整度","风险标签":"$record.风险标签","状态说明":"=record.缺失项 ? \"存在待补充字段，仍需澄清\" : \"已生成技术画像，可进入候选筛选\""}}
{"tableId":"technical_profile","sheetName":"技术画像","keyField":"技术画像ID","keyValueExpr":"$row.技术画像ID"}
{"tableId":"request_intake","sheetName":"需求受理台账","keyField":"需求编号","keyValueExpr":"$row.需求编号"}
{"fieldMap":{"技术画像ID":"$record.技术画像ID","标准介质组":"$record.标准介质组","温度分段":"$record.温度分段","压力分段":"$record.压力分段","技术完整度":"$record.技术完整度","风险标签":"$record.风险标签","缺失项":"$record.缺失项","受理状态":"$record.受理状态"}}
{"template":"技术画像已生成，当前状态 {受理状态}","messageType":"success"}

{"inputPorts":"[{\"name\":\"normalizedProfile\",\"type\":\"object\",\"label\":\"normalizedProfile\",\"description\":\"\"},{\"name\":\"missingFields\",\"type\":\"array\",\"label\":\"missingFields\",\"description\":\"\"},{\"name\":\"riskFlags\",\"type\":\"array\",\"label\":\"riskFlags\",\"description\":\"\"},{\"name\":\"statusPatch\",\"type\":\"object\",\"label\":\"statusPatch\",\"description\":\"\"},{\"name\":\"profileId\",\"type\":\"number\",\"label\":\"profileId\",\"description\":\"\"},{\"name\":\"writeProfile\",\"type\":\"object\",\"label\":\"writeProfile\",\"description\":\"\"},{\"name\":\"writeRequest\",\"type\":\"object\",\"label\":\"writeRequest\",\"description\":\"\"},{\"name\":\"message\",\"type\":\"string\",\"label\":\"message\",\"description\":\"\"},{\"name\":\"appliedFields\",\"type\":\"array\",\"label\":\"appliedFields\",\"description\":\"\"}]"}

workflows.name: 生成候选方案
workflows.description: 根据技术画像筛出候选阀门并匹配附件组合。

data.propertiesJson: {"outputPorts":"[{\"name\":\"profile\",\"type\":\"object\",\"label\":\"技术画像\",\"description\":\"当前技术画像对象\"}]"}
{"tableId":"valve_catalog","sheetName":"阀门主数据"}
{"tableId":"option_catalog","sheetName":"选项附件库"}

{"criteria":[{"field":"阀门品类","operator":"equals","valuePath":"$context.阀门品类"},{"field":"介质组","operator":"equals","valuePath":"$context.标准介质组"},{"field":"适用DN","operator":"equals","valuePath":"$context.公称通径DN"},{"field":"最高PN","operator":">=","valuePath":"$context.压力等级PN"},{"field":"最高温度","operator":">=","valuePath":"$context.设计温度"},{"field":"连接方式","operator":"equals","valuePath":"$context.连接方式"}]}
{"criteria":[{"field":"驱动方式","operator":"equals","valuePath":"$context.驱动方式"}]}
{"criteria":[{"field":"泄漏等级","operator":"equals","value":"VI级","enabled":false}]}

{"leftKey":"选项键","rightKey":"选项键","fieldMap":{"方案编码":"= \"CAN-\" + (context?.需求编号 || \"\") + \"-\" + (inputs.index != null ? inputs.index + 1 : 1)","型号":"$record.型号","阀门品类":"$record.阀门品类","材质":"$record.材质","基础报价":"$record.基础报价","报价附加":"$context.reference.报价附加","组合报价":"=Number(record.基础报价 || 0) + Number(context.reference?.报价附加 || 0)","预计交期天数":"$record.交期天数","附件包":"$context.reference.附件包","执行器型号":"$context.reference.执行器型号","密封方案":"$context.reference.密封方案","风险系数":"$record.风险系数","推荐优先级":"$record.推荐优先级","维护系数":"$record.维护系数","适配说明":"$context.reference.适配说明"}}

{"includeSource":false,"fieldMap":{"summary":"=inputs.candidateCount === 0 ? `未找到满足 ${inputs.profile?.阀门品类 || \"\"}/${inputs.profile?.标准介质组 || \"\"}/DN${inputs.profile?.公称通径DN || \"\"}/PN${inputs.profile?.压力等级PN || \"\"} 的候选` : `已根据阀门品类、介质组、DN、PN、温度、连接方式和驱动方式筛出 ${inputs.candidateCount} 条候选`"}}
{"fieldMap":{"候选方案清单":"$records","候选数量":"$count","候选过滤摘要":"$message"},"emptyPatch":{"候选方案清单":[],"候选数量":0,"候选过滤摘要":"$message"}}
{"template":"{summary}","messageType":"success"}

{"inputPorts":"[{\"name\":\"candidateRows\",\"type\":\"array\",\"label\":\"candidateRows\",\"description\":\"\"},{\"name\":\"candidateCount\",\"type\":\"number\",\"label\":\"candidateCount\",\"description\":\"\"},{\"name\":\"filterSummary\",\"type\":\"string\",\"label\":\"filterSummary\",\"description\":\"\"},{\"name\":\"message\",\"type\":\"string\",\"label\":\"message\",\"description\":\"\"},{\"name\":\"appliedFields\",\"type\":\"array\",\"label\":\"appliedFields\",\"description\":\"\"}]"}

workflows.name: 评分排序
workflows.description: 对候选方案进行技术、交期、成本与维护性评分。

data.propertiesJson: {"outputPorts":"[{\"name\":\"profile\",\"type\":\"object\",\"label\":\"profile\",\"description\":\"\"},{\"name\":\"candidateRows\",\"type\":\"array\",\"label\":\"candidateRows\",\"description\":\"\"}]"}

{"scoreRules":[{"target":"技术评分","expr":"=60 - Math.round(Number(record.风险系数 || 1) * 10) + Math.max(0, 6 - Number(record.推荐优先级 || 5))"},{"target":"交期评分","expr":"=String(context?.交期要求 || \"\") === \"加急\" ? Math.max(0, 40 - Number(record.预计交期天数 || 0) * 2) : Math.max(0, 30 - Number(record.预计交期天数 || 0))"},{"target":"成本评分","expr":"=String(context?.预算等级 || \"\") === \"经济型\" ? Math.max(0, 40 - Math.round(Number(record.组合报价 || 0) / 500)) : (String(context?.预算等级 || \"\") === \"标准型\" ? Math.max(0, 30 - Math.round(Number(record.组合报价 || 0) / 800)) : Math.max(0, 25 - Math.round(Number(record.组合报价 || 0) / 1200)))"},{"target":"维护评分","expr":"=Math.max(0, 20 - Math.round(Number(record.维护系数 || 1) * 8))"}],"totalField":"总评分","sorts":[{"field":"总评分","order":"desc"}]}
{"includeSource":false,"fieldMap":{"summary":"=inputs.count === 0 ? \"无候选可评分\" : `已完成 ${inputs.count} 条候选评分，最高分 ${inputs.first?.总评分 ?? \"\"}`"}}
{"fieldMap":{"评分结果":"$records","评分摘要":"$message"}}
{"template":"{summary}","messageType":"success"}

{"inputPorts":"[{\"name\":\"rankedCandidates\",\"type\":\"array\",\"label\":\"rankedCandidates\",\"description\":\"\"},{\"name\":\"scoreSummary\",\"type\":\"string\",\"label\":\"scoreSummary\",\"description\":\"\"},{\"name\":\"message\",\"type\":\"string\",\"label\":\"message\",\"description\":\"\"},{\"name\":\"appliedFields\",\"type\":\"array\",\"label\":\"appliedFields\",\"description\":\"\"}]"}

workflows.name: 生成提案
workflows.description: 从评分结果生成推荐方案与备选方案。

data.propertiesJson: {"outputPorts":"[{\"name\":\"profile\",\"type\":\"object\",\"label\":\"profile\",\"description\":\"\"},{\"name\":\"rankedCandidates\",\"type\":\"array\",\"label\":\"rankedCandidates\",\"description\":\"\"}]"}
{"pickMode":"first","sorts":[{"field":"总评分","order":"desc"}]}
{"pickMode":"topN","topN":4,"sorts":[{"field":"总评分","order":"desc"}]}

{"includeSource":false,"fieldMap":{"推荐方案号":"=inputs.recommended ? \"CASE-\" + (inputs.profile?.需求编号 || \"\") : \"\"","推荐型号":"=inputs.recommended?.型号 || \"\"","推荐附件":"=inputs.recommended?.附件包 || \"\"","推荐报价":"=inputs.recommended?.组合报价 || \"\"","预计交期天数":"=inputs.recommended?.预计交期天数 || \"\"","推荐理由":"=inputs.recommended ? `优先推荐 ${inputs.recommended.型号}，因其总评分最高，兼顾 ${inputs.profile?.预算等级 || \"预算\"}、${inputs.profile?.交期要求 || \"交期\"} 与 ${inputs.profile?.风险标签 || \"风险\"}。` : \"未找到满足条件的候选，建议回到技术澄清阶段调整边界。\"","备选方案":"=Array.isArray(inputs.topRows) ? inputs.topRows.slice(1, 4) : []","受理状态":"=inputs.recommended ? \"待确认\" : \"待澄清\"","pricingSummary":"=inputs.recommended ? `推荐组合报价 ${inputs.recommended.组合报价} 元，预计交期 ${inputs.recommended.预计交期天数} 天` : \"暂无可生成提案的候选\"","reasonSummary":"=inputs.recommended ? `优先推荐 ${inputs.recommended.型号}，因其总评分最高，兼顾 ${inputs.profile?.预算等级 || \"预算\"}、${inputs.profile?.交期要求 || \"交期\"} 与 ${inputs.profile?.风险标签 || \"风险\"}。` : \"未找到满足条件的候选，建议回到技术澄清阶段调整边界。\""}}
{"fieldMap":{"推荐方案号":"$record.推荐方案号","推荐型号":"$record.推荐型号","推荐附件":"$record.推荐附件","推荐报价":"$record.推荐报价","预计交期天数":"$record.预计交期天数","推荐理由":"$record.推荐理由","备选方案":"$record.备选方案","受理状态":"$record.受理状态"}}
{"template":"{reasonSummary}","messageType":"success"}
{"expression":"inputs.record?.备选方案 || []","targetField":""}
{"expression":"String(inputs.record?.pricingSummary || \"\")","targetField":""}

{"inputPorts":"[{\"name\":\"patch\",\"type\":\"object\",\"label\":\"patch\",\"description\":\"\"},{\"name\":\"recommendedOption\",\"type\":\"object\",\"label\":\"recommendedOption\",\"description\":\"\"},{\"name\":\"alternativeOptions\",\"type\":\"array\",\"label\":\"alternativeOptions\",\"description\":\"\"},{\"name\":\"pricingSummary\",\"type\":\"string\",\"label\":\"pricingSummary\",\"description\":\"\"},{\"name\":\"reasonSummary\",\"type\":\"string\",\"label\":\"reasonSummary\",\"description\":\"\"},{\"name\":\"message\",\"type\":\"string\",\"label\":\"message\",\"description\":\"\"},{\"name\":\"appliedFields\",\"type\":\"array\",\"label\":\"appliedFields\",\"description\":\"\"}]"}

workflows.name: 确认方案
workflows.description: 把最终确认结果写回主记录。

data.propertiesJson: {"outputPorts":"[{\"name\":\"confirmation\",\"type\":\"object\",\"label\":\"confirmation\",\"description\":\"\"}]"}
{"includeSource":false,"fieldMap":{"需求编号":"$record.需求编号","受理状态":"已确认","推荐方案号":"=record.推荐方案号 || (\"CASE-\" + (record.需求编号 || \"\"))","最终确认人":"=record.最终确认人 || \"待指派\"","状态说明":"已完成方案确认，等待归档"}}
{"includeSource":false,"fieldMap":{"技术画像ID":"$record.技术画像ID","需求编号":"$record.需求编号","受理状态":"已确认"}}
{"tableId":"request_intake","sheetName":"需求受理台账","keyField":"需求编号","keyValueExpr":"$row.需求编号"}
{"tableId":"technical_profile","sheetName":"技术画像","keyField":"技术画像ID","keyValueExpr":"$row.技术画像ID"}
{"fieldMap":{"推荐方案号":"$record.推荐方案号","受理状态":"$record.受理状态"}}
{"template":"方案 {推荐方案号} 已确认","messageType":"success"}
{"expression":"String(inputs.record?.推荐方案号 || \"\")","targetField":""}

{"inputPorts":"[{\"name\":\"finalCaseId\",\"type\":\"string\",\"label\":\"finalCaseId\",\"description\":\"\"},{\"name\":\"statusPatch\",\"type\":\"object\",\"label\":\"statusPatch\",\"description\":\"\"},{\"name\":\"writeRequest\",\"type\":\"object\",\"label\":\"writeRequest\",\"description\":\"\"},{\"name\":\"writeProfile\",\"type\":\"object\",\"label\":\"writeProfile\",\"description\":\"\"},{\"name\":\"message\",\"type\":\"string\",\"label\":\"message\",\"description\":\"\"},{\"name\":\"appliedFields\",\"type\":\"array\",\"label\":\"appliedFields\",\"description\":\"\"}]"}

workflows.name: 归档案例
workflows.description: 将最终方案沉淀到案例库和审计日志。

data.propertiesJson: {"outputPorts":"[{\"name\":\"archiveRecord\",\"type\":\"object\",\"label\":\"archiveRecord\",\"description\":\"\"}]"}

{"includeSource":false,"fieldMap":{"案例ID":"=record.推荐方案号 || (\"CASE-\" + (record.需求编号 || \"\"))","需求编号":"$record.需求编号","推荐方案号":"=record.推荐方案号 || (\"CASE-\" + (record.需求编号 || \"\"))","推荐型号":"$record.推荐型号","推荐附件":"$record.推荐附件","推荐报价":"$record.推荐报价","预计交期天数":"$record.预计交期天数","风险标签":"$record.风险标签","最终确认人":"$record.最终确认人","候选数量":"=Array.isArray(record.评分结果) ? record.评分结果.length : Number(record.候选数量 || 0)","归档时间":"2026-07-06T18:00:00.000Z"}}

{"includeSource":false,"fieldMap":{"审计ID":"= \"AUD-\" + (record.需求编号 || \"\") + \"-FINAL\"","需求编号":"$record.需求编号","节点名称":"归档案例","节点结论":"已归档","状态流转":"已确认->已归档","操作人":"=record.最终确认人 || \"系统\"","时间戳":"2026-07-06T18:00:00.000Z","备注":"由第三代流程样板自动归档"}}
{"tableId":"selection_cases","sheetName":"选型案例库","keyField":"案例ID","keyValueExpr":"$row.案例ID"}
{"tableId":"selection_audit_log","sheetName":"选型审计日志","keyField":"审计ID","keyValueExpr":"$row.审计ID"}
{"includeSource":false,"fieldMap":{"案例摘要":"= `已归档案例 ${inputs.caseRow?.案例ID || \"\"}，确认人 ${inputs.archiveRecord?.最终确认人 || \"系统\"}`"}}
{"fieldMap":{"案例摘要":"$record.案例摘要"}}
{"template":"案例 {案例ID} 已归档","messageType":"success"}
{"expression":"String(inputs.record?.案例ID || \"\")","targetField":""}
{"expression":"String(inputs.record?.审计ID || \"\")","targetField":""}

{"inputPorts":"[{\"name\":\"caseId\",\"type\":\"string\",\"label\":\"caseId\",\"description\":\"\"},{\"name\":\"auditId\",\"type\":\"string\",\"label\":\"auditId\",\"description\":\"\"},{\"name\":\"writeCase\",\"type\":\"object\",\"label\":\"writeCase\",\"description\":\"\"},{\"name\":\"writeAudit\",\"type\":\"object\",\"label\":\"writeAudit\",\"description\":\"\"},{\"name\":\"message\",\"type\":\"string\",\"label\":\"message\",\"description\":\"\"},{\"name\":\"appliedFields\",\"type\":\"array\",\"label\":\"appliedFields\",\"description\":\"\"}]"}

workflows.name: 快速推荐台按编号回填
workflows.description: 输入需求编号后自动从受理台账回填历史工况。

data.propertiesJson: {"outputPorts":"[{\"name\":\"requestId\",\"type\":\"number\",\"label\":\"需求编号\",\"description\":\"输入的需求编号\"}]"}
{"tableId":"request_intake","sheetName":"需求受理台账"}
{"keyField":"需求编号"}
{"fieldMap":{"介质":"介质","阀门品类":"阀门品类","公称通径DN":"公称通径DN","压力等级PN":"压力等级PN","设计温度":"设计温度","目标流量":"目标流量","连接方式":"连接方式","驱动方式":"驱动方式","泄漏等级":"泄漏等级","预算等级":"预算等级","交期要求":"交期要求"},"messageField":"状态说明"}
{"template":"已按需求编号自动带出历史工况","messageType":"success"}
{"expression":"Number(inputs.count || 0) > 0","targetField":""}

{"inputPorts":"[{\"name\":\"record\",\"type\":\"object\",\"label\":\"record\",\"description\":\"\"},{\"name\":\"matched\",\"type\":\"boolean\",\"label\":\"matched\",\"description\":\"\"},{\"name\":\"message\",\"type\":\"string\",\"label\":\"message\",\"description\":\"\"},{\"name\":\"appliedFields\",\"type\":\"array\",\"label\":\"appliedFields\",\"description\":\"\"}]"}

workflows.name: 一页式快速推荐
workflows.description: 面向二代同款交互表单的一页式推荐流程，不复用旧二代流程拆法。

data.propertiesJson: {"outputPorts":"[{\"name\":\"request\",\"type\":\"object\",\"label\":\"选型输入\",\"description\":\"快速推荐表单输入对象\"}]"}

{"rules":[{"target":"标准介质组","source":"$record.介质","mode":"enum","defaultValue":"通用系统","map":{"清水":"水系统","蒸汽":"蒸汽系统","油品":"油品系统","腐蚀液":"腐蚀系统","天然气":"气体系统"}},{"target":"温度分段","source":"$record.设计温度","mode":"range","defaultValue":"常温","ranges":[{"min":260,"value":"高温"},{"min":120,"max":260,"value":"中高温"},{"min":-9999,"max":120,"value":"常温"}]},{"target":"压力分段","source":"$record.压力等级PN","mode":"range","defaultValue":"常压","ranges":[{"min":40,"value":"超高压"},{"min":25,"max":40,"value":"中高压"},{"min":-9999,"max":25,"value":"常压"}]}]}
{"tableId":"valve_catalog","sheetName":"阀门主数据"}
{"tableId":"option_catalog","sheetName":"选项附件库"}
{"includeSource":true,"fieldMap":{"标准介质组":"=inputs.classifications[\"标准介质组\"]"}}

{"criteria":[{"field":"阀门品类","operator":"equals","valuePath":"$context.阀门品类"},{"field":"介质组","operator":"equals","valuePath":"$context.标准介质组"},{"field":"适用DN","operator":"equals","valuePath":"$context.公称通径DN"},{"field":"最高PN","operator":">=","valuePath":"$context.压力等级PN"},{"field":"最高温度","operator":">=","valuePath":"$context.设计温度"},{"field":"连接方式","operator":"equals","valuePath":"$context.连接方式"}]}
{"criteria":[{"field":"驱动方式","operator":"equals","valuePath":"$context.驱动方式"}]}

{"leftKey":"选项键","rightKey":"选项键","fieldMap":{"方案编码":"= \"FAST-\" + (context?.需求编号 || \"REQ\") + \"-\" + (inputs.index != null ? inputs.index + 1 : 1)","型号":"$record.型号","阀门品类":"$record.阀门品类","材质":"$record.材质","附件包":"$context.reference.附件包","执行器型号":"$context.reference.执行器型号","密封方案":"$context.reference.密封方案","组合报价":"=Number(record.基础报价 || 0) + Number(context.reference?.报价附加 || 0)","预计交期天数":"$record.交期天数","风险系数":"$record.风险系数","推荐优先级":"$record.推荐优先级","维护系数":"$record.维护系数","适配说明":"$context.reference.适配说明"}}

{"scoreRules":[{"target":"技术评分","expr":"=60 - Math.round(Number(record.风险系数 || 1) * 10) + Math.max(0, 6 - Number(record.推荐优先级 || 5))"},{"target":"交期评分","expr":"=String(context?.交期要求 || \"\") === \"加急\" ? Math.max(0, 40 - Number(record.预计交期天数 || 0) * 2) : Math.max(0, 30 - Number(record.预计交期天数 || 0))"},{"target":"成本评分","expr":"=String(context?.预算等级 || \"\") === \"经济型\" ? Math.max(0, 40 - Math.round(Number(record.组合报价 || 0) / 500)) : (String(context?.预算等级 || \"\") === \"标准型\" ? Math.max(0, 30 - Math.round(Number(record.组合报价 || 0) / 800)) : Math.max(0, 25 - Math.round(Number(record.组合报价 || 0) / 1200)))"},{"target":"维护评分","expr":"=Math.max(0, 20 - Math.round(Number(record.维护系数 || 1) * 8))"}],"totalField":"总评分","sorts":[{"field":"总评分","order":"desc"}]}
{"pickMode":"first","sorts":[{"field":"总评分","order":"desc"}]}

{"includeSource":false,"fieldMap":{"标准介质组":"$inputs.profile.标准介质组","候选方案清单":"=inputs.candidateRows || []","候选数量":"=inputs.count || 0","推荐方案号":"=inputs.recommended ? \"FAST-\" + (inputs.profile?.需求编号 || \"REQ\") : \"\"","推荐型号":"=inputs.recommended?.型号 || \"\"","推荐附件":"=inputs.recommended?.附件包 || \"\"","推荐报价":"=inputs.recommended?.组合报价 || \"\"","预计交期天数":"=inputs.recommended?.预计交期天数 || \"\"","推荐理由":"=inputs.recommended ? `推荐 ${inputs.recommended.型号}，其综合评分最高，兼顾预算、交期与风险要求。` : \"暂无可推荐型号，建议回到三代技术澄清流程补充条件。\"","候选过滤摘要":"=inputs.count === 0 ? \"未找到满足当前工况边界的候选，请调整温度、压力或驱动方式。\" : `已按介质组、品类、DN、PN、温度、连接与驱动综合筛出 ${inputs.count} 条候选`"}}

{"fieldMap":{"标准介质组":"$record.标准介质组","候选方案清单":"$record.候选方案清单","候选数量":"$record.候选数量","推荐方案号":"$record.推荐方案号","推荐型号":"$record.推荐型号","推荐附件":"$record.推荐附件","推荐报价":"$record.推荐报价","预计交期天数":"$record.预计交期天数","推荐理由":"$record.推荐理由","候选过滤摘要":"$record.候选过滤摘要"}}
{"template":"{推荐理由}","messageType":"success"}
{"expression":"String(inputs.record?.候选过滤摘要 || \"\")","targetField":""}

{"inputPorts":"[{\"name\":\"patch\",\"type\":\"object\",\"label\":\"patch\",\"description\":\"\"},{\"name\":\"candidateRows\",\"type\":\"array\",\"label\":\"candidateRows\",\"description\":\"\"},{\"name\":\"recommendedOption\",\"type\":\"object\",\"label\":\"recommendedOption\",\"description\":\"\"},{\"name\":\"filterSummary\",\"type\":\"string\",\"label\":\"filterSummary\",\"description\":\"\"},{\"name\":\"reasonSummary\",\"type\":\"string\",\"label\":\"reasonSummary\",\"description\":\"\"},{\"name\":\"message\",\"type\":\"string\",\"label\":\"message\",\"description\":\"\"},{\"name\":\"appliedFields\",\"type\":\"array\",\"label\":\"appliedFields\",\"description\":\"\"}]"}
